name: Marquette
content: I lived in Marquette during the summer of 2024. Marquette is the largest city in the Upper Peninsula of Michigan, with a population of 10,000 people. I really liked living in Marquette and miss it all the time. There are plenty of nice places by Lake Superior and the surrounding forests. I met many cool people while munching in the raspberry and thimbleberry bushes around the city. Respect the 906. I am convinced the elementary school here is secretly the same elementary school as the one from Calvin and Hobbes.
